summary: High‑quality stereo SBD transfer with solid mastering; reviewers praise the audio but give no insight into the musical performance.
review: Both reviewers focus on the recording itself, noting a superb stereo soundboard source and a well‑executed transfer/mastering job by Charlie. No comments are made about the band's playing, setlist flow, or individual members, so the show quality remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive remarks about a clean stereo soundboard transfer boost the rating, but the absence of any performance commentary limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Stereo SBD praised as 'best turned better' and a solid transfer/mastering job; no reported flaws.
